heading: Purchase of paper, envelopes, etc., for stationery rooms of Senate and House
label: 4105 Purchase of paper, envelopes, etc., for stationery rooms of Senate and House
text: Paper, envelopes, and blank books required by the stationery rooms of the Senate and House of Representatives for sale to Senators and Members for official use may be purchased from the Director of the Government Publishing Office at actual cost thereof and payment therefor shall be made before delivery.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 110 of this title

Change of NameStationery room of House of Representatives redesignated Office Supply Service.“Director of the Government Publishing Office” substituted for “Public Printer” in text on authority of , set out as a note under , Public Printing and Documents.section 1301(d) of Pub. L. 113–235section 301 of Title 44
